name: Fuzzy Navel Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
3 tablespoons frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. COOKIE CRUST: In a medium bowl, stir together flour and sugar. Add egg, butter or margarine, and vanilla extract. Beat with an electric mixer until well combined.
2. Press the dough evenly onto the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and set aside.
3. FILLING: In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, orange juice concentrate, sugar, sour cream, peach schnapps, cornstarch, lemon juice, and vanilla extract. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes. Lower the temperature to 200°F (95°C) and bake for an additional hour and 10 minutes, or until the center is no longer shiny or wet.
7. Remove the cake from the oven and run a knife around the edge of the pan.
8. GLAZE: In a small saucepan, combine orange marmalade, frozen orange juice concentrate, peach schnapps, cornstarch, and lemon juice. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, about 2 minutes longer.
9. Pour the glaze over the cheesecake and chill until serving time.
10. Makes 12-18 servings.
